positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a celestial forest at twilight. The scene features ancient, gnarled trees with glowing bioluminescent foliage, creating a deep contrast against a vibrant, swirling nebula sky. A small, ethereal creature (like a stylized fox or deer silhouette) stands in the foreground, bathed in the soft glow of hanging moons and star clusters. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centralized, focusing on strong, readable silhouettes and clean, graphic lines. Use a dreamy, neo-art deco aesthetic with deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, gold accents, and deep purples. The overall mood is whimsical and majestic, designed for high-contrast apparel printing, suitable for a 300 DPI print finish.
negative: blur, noise, grain, text, watermarks, logos, trademarks, messy, dirty, low resolution, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grayscale, photograph, photo-realistic, busy background
